rationale: In the theoretical framework, the citing paper uses Szymanowski and Gijsbrechts (2012) to support a specific mechanism: consumers can transfer positive private-label attitudes across retailers. That claim is used to motivate the prediction that private-label-prone households will be more likely to adopt the new hard discounter, and it feeds into the paper's heterogeneity framing. Although the cited study is not reused methodologically, it plays a clear conceptual role beyond a generic literature-list mention.
relation_description: The citing paper applies an insight from the cited paper - cross-retailer transfer of private-label attitudes - to explain and motivate expected household responses to hard-discounter entry. This prior evidence is used in hypothesis framing about private-label-prone consumers rather than in model estimation.
